site.title: New E-shop
site.description: Your path to a successful online business starts here – step by step, fearlessly, and with support

hero.title: Don't Be Afraid to Launch Your E-shop!
hero.subtitle: Every successful entrepreneur started just like you – with an idea and a lot of questions
hero.description: This page was 'vibe coded' to summarize the most important materials from the training I did for Holky z Byznysu. You'll find everything essential in one place.
hero.ctaSecondary: I'm not sure where to start
hero.story: I'm David, and for 9+ years I've helped hundreds of entrepreneurs. I know how you feel – and I know you can do it!

support.title: You're Not Alone
support.helpText: Launching an e-shop doesn't have to be stressful. You have support and experience by your side to guide you to your goal.
support.confidence: Every step is well-thought-out to give you confidence and a clear direction.

organizations.title: Part of a Community That Supports You
organizations.subtitle: I collaborate with organizations that believe in the power of women's entrepreneurship and educating young people

holkyZByznysu.name: Holky z Byznysu
holkyZByznysu.description: The largest community of women entrepreneurs in the Czech Republic – a place where you'll find inspiration, support, and practical advice
holkyZByznysu.focus: Focused on women who want to start or are already running a business

muzesPodnikat.name: Můžeš Podnikat
muzesPodnikat.description: A program for high schools – to show young people that entrepreneurship isn't rocket science
muzesPodnikat.focus: Education and inspiration for future entrepreneurs

mentoring.title: Individual Mentoring
mentoring.description: I provide personal mentoring to founders within Holky z Byznysu
mentoring.note: Because every business is different and sometimes you need individual advice

learningPath.title: Your Path to Success
learningPath.subtitle: Step by step, without skipping, and with a clear goal

beforeStart.title: Before You Begin
beforeStart.description: Not sure if an e-shop is for you? Are you scared? That's normal!

calculator.title: Find Out If It Makes Sense
calculator.description: In 3 minutes, you'll find out if your idea can make money

checklist.title: Launch Your E-shop
checklist.description: A 15-day plan with concrete tasks – step by step to your goal

fear.title: It's Normal to Be Scared
points: Every successful entrepreneur started with doubts
Fear means you care about it
The most important thing is to start – you'll learn the rest along the way
You have support and you're not alone

reality.title: The Reality of Business
reality.honest: It won't be easy, but you can definitely do it
points: The first few months will be challenging – that's normal
You don't have to earn thousands right away – start with a small profit
Mistakes are part of learning, not failure
You'll learn something new every day

beforeStart.title: Not sure where to start?
beforeStart.subtitle: That's perfectly fine. Every successful entrepreneur has gone through the same uncertainty.

hero.title: It's Normal to Be Scared
hero.description: When I launched my first e-shop, I also thought I knew nothing. That everyone around me was better. Impostor syndrome is brutal – but that pressure forced me to learn, ask questions, and constantly improve. Today I know that every successful entrepreneur has gone through the same feeling of 'I don't know what I'm doing'.

fears.reality: Nobody did when they started. You'll gain experience along the way – that's the only way.
Then you'll adjust it or start over. No e-shop is perfect right from the start.
Competition is proof that a market exists. Your value will be in how you do it differently.

fears.fear: "I don't know what I don't know"
fears.reality: That's why I'm here. I'll show you step by step what you need to know.

realityCheck.title: The Reality of the First Few Months
realityCheck.honest: I'll be honest with you – it won't be easy, but it's definitely manageable
points: First 3 months: You'll learn the basics, get your first orders, and have many questions
Months 4-6: You'll start to understand what works and what doesn't
After half a year: You'll have a rhythm and clarity on where to go next
After a year: You'll know exactly what you're doing and can grow

firstSteps.title: Your First Steps (Stress-Free)
firstSteps.intro: Start with a small test – you don't have to build a big e-shop right away

steps.title: Test the Calculator
steps.description: In 3 minutes, you'll find out if your idea makes sense

steps.title: Go Through the Materials
steps.description: Look at the practical guides and find out what awaits you

steps.title: Check the Checklist
steps.description: The 15-day plan will show you concrete steps

communities.name: Holky z Byznysu
communities.description: A community of thousands of women entrepreneurs who will advise and support you

communities.name: Individual Mentoring
communities.description: Personal consultations for more complex questions

cta.needMore: I want to know more about David

calculator.title: E-shop Financial Calculator
calculator.subtitle: Find out if your idea has profitable potential
calculator.tip: If you're unsure about some numbers, use estimates. The calculator will show you if the idea is promising - you can fine-tune the exact numbers later.
calculator.learnMoreDesc: In our comprehensive presentation, you'll find detailed procedures, strategies, and practical tips for launching a successful e-shop.

step1.title: Your Goal
step1.description: How much do you want to earn?
step1.question: How much do you want to earn with your e-shop?
step1.hint: Profit is what's left after deducting all costs

step2.title: Your E-shop
step2.question: Tell us about your e-shop
step2.aovTooltip: How much a customer spends on average per order
step2.aovHint: Clothing: usually lower, Electronics: higher values, Cosmetics: medium prices
step2.cogsTooltip: How much the products you sell cost you (purchase + shipping to you)
step2.extraTooltip: Shipping to the customer, packaging, payment gateway, etc.
step2.extraHint: Shipping, packaging, payments – usually 10-15% of AOV

step3.title: Marketing
step3.question: How do you get customers?
step3.conversionTooltip: What percentage of visitors make a purchase. Out of 100 visitors, with a 2% conversion, 2 people will buy.
step3.budgetTooltip: How much you spend on advertising, social media, and other forms of promotion

checklist.title: 15-day action checklist for launching an e-shop
checklist.subtitle: Simple, practical plan that works on any platform

guide.title: Detailed Guide
guide.description: Detailed materials and procedures for each step in the presentation

export.title: Export Checklist
export.description: Download your progress as a PDF

pdf.title: 15-day Launch Checklist for Starting an E-shop
pdf.subtitle: Your path to a successful online business

zivnost.title: Start processing business license
zivnost.description: Submit application at office or online. License can take 5-7 days, so start right away.

bankAccount.title: Open business account
bankAccount.description: Choose bank with favorable rates (e.g. local banks) and open account for business.

budget.title: Create basic budget
budget.description: Plan 30% for web and setup, 70% for marketing (e.g. $500 for ads).

paymentGateway.title: Apply for payment gateway
paymentGateway.description: Choose Stripe, PayPal or local gateway. Approval can take a few days.
paymentGateway.tips: Gateway approval takes a few days, don't delay.

shipping.title: Create carrier account
shipping.description: Register with shipping carriers according to your needs.

shippingPrices.title: Compare shipping prices
shippingPrices.description: Choose carrier that's most cost-effective for your target market.

offline.title: You're Offline
offline.description: You're offline. Some features may not be available.

about.title: About David Simões
about.subtitle: Founder of the first Shopify agency in the Czech Republic • Member of Shopsys Group • Shopify Partner since 2016 with 5.0⭐ rating

intro.greeting: Hi there! I'm David Simões, founder of soundsgood.agency and your guide to the world of e-commerce.
intro.experience: I have 9+ years of practical experience with various types of online businesses – from small startups to companies with over 3 billion CZK in annual revenue.
intro.approach: My approach is simple: Keep It Simple, Stupid! I learned this in the USA, and it works.
intro.honesty: I've had successes and failures. And it's from those failures that I've learned the most.

upcomingWebinar.title: Upcoming Webinar
upcomingWebinar.name: How to Build an E-shop from Scratch

meta.keywords: e-shop checklist, launch online business, financial calculator, online business, e-commerce education, David Simões

profit.title: Profit
profit.description: What's left after deducting all costs. Money you can keep or reinvest back into the business.

aov.title: AOV (Average Order Value)
aov.description: The average amount a customer spends per order. Calculate it: total revenue ÷ number of orders.

cogs.title: COGS (Cost of Goods Sold)
cogs.description: The cost of goods – how much the products you sell cost you (purchase, production, packaging, shipping).

margin.title: Margin
margin.description: The percentage that remains from an order after deducting costs. Gross = without extra costs, net = with them.

agency.title: Shopify Experts
agency.name: Sounds Good Agency
agency.description: Shopify agency focused on technology and strategy for e-commerce

platform.title: E-shop Platform
platform.description: The world's most popular e-commerce platform

bottom.created: Made with ❤️ for everyone who wants to succeed in e-commerce
